name: sir-syed-convent-school
description: Sir Syed Convent School – Full-Stack Website & Admin Portal

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: cd backend && npx cross-env NODE_ENV=production node server.js
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:init && npm run build
scripts.production: npm run build && npm run start
